/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -g -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wall -Wextra -Wstrict-aliasing -Wno-unused-parameter -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PersistentVector_test.dir/tests/PersistentVector_test.c.o CMakeFiles/PersistentVector_test.dir/tests/TestTools.c.o -o PersistentVector_test  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libruntime.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcmocka.1.0.0.dylib
